messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Como configurar Oracle GoldenGate para replicação entre datacenter e OCI?

Configuração GoldenGate on-premises → OCI:

**1. Pré-requisitos:** GoldenGate instalado nos dois lados, ARCHIVELOG mode, supplemental logging

**2. Source:**
```sql
ALTER DATABASE ADD SUPPLEMENTAL LOG DATA;
CREATE USER c##ggadmin IDENTIFIED BY password;
GRANT DBA TO c##ggadmin;
```

**3. Extract:**
```
GGSCI> ADD EXTRACT ext1, TRANLOG, BEGIN NOW
GGSCI> ADD EXTTRAIL ./dirdat/lt, EXTRACT ext1
```

**4. Data Pump:**
```
GGSCI> ADD EXTRACT dpump1, EXTTRAILSOURCE ./dirdat/lt
GGSCI> ADD RMTTRAIL ./dirdat/rt, EXTRACT dpump1
```

**5. Replicat (OCI):**
```
GGSCI> ADD REPLICAT rep1, EXTTRAIL ./dirdat/rt
GGSCI> START EXTRACT ext1
GGSCI> START REPLICAT rep1
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Como usar OCI Data Integration para criar pipelines ETL?

OCI Data Integration é serverless para ETL/ELT:

**1. Crie Workspace:** Analytics & AI → Data Integration → Create Workspace

**2. Configure conexões:** Oracle Database, Autonomous Database, Object Storage, MySQL, PostgreSQL

**3. Crie Data Flow:**
- Source → Transform (filtros, joins, mapeamentos) → Target

**4. Agendamento:** Applications → Create Application → schedule cron

**5. Monitoramento:** Tasks → Executions, logs integrados com OCI Logging

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Como transferir petabytes de dados para OCI com banda limitada?

Use OCI Data Transfer Service (disco físico):

**1. Crie Transfer Job:**
```bash
oci dts job create --display-name "migração" --device-type DISK --transfer-type IMPORT
```

**2. Oracle envia discos criptografados (80TB cada)**

**3. Copie dados:** rsync -avz /data/source/ /mnt/transfer-disk/

**4. Envie de volta com etiqueta fornecida**

**Alternativas:** FastConnect (1-10 Gbps), OCI CLI multipart upload

[MUTABLE] Custos variam. Tempo: 2-4 semanas.

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
GoldenGate com erro de sync e replicação parada. Como troubleshootar?

Troubleshooting GoldenGate:

**1. Diagnóstico:**
```
GGSCI> INFO ALL
GGSCI> VIEW REPORT rep1
```

**2. Erros comuns:**
- ORA-00001 (unique constraint): Use HANDLECOLLISIONS
- ORA-01403 (no data found): REPERROR (DEFAULT, DISCARD)
- Trail corruption: ALTER REPLICAT rep1, BEGIN <last-checkpoint>

**3. Logs:** ggserr.log, dirrpt/rep1.dsc

**4. Recovery:**
```
GGSCI> STOP REPLICAT rep1
GGSCI> ALTER REPLICAT rep1, BEGIN <seqno>
GGSCI> START REPLICAT rep1
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Como monitorar progresso de transferência de dados em massa para OCI?

Monitoramento:

**1. Object Storage:**
```bash
oci os object list --bucket-name meu-bucket --fields size,timeCreated
oci os multipart list --bucket-name meu-bucket
```

**2. GoldenGate:**
```
GGSCI> INFO ALL
GGSCI> LAG REPLICAT rep1
```

**3. Data Transfer Service:** Console → Data Transfer → Jobs (status: In Progress, Loading, Complete)

**4. Script:**
```bash
SOURCE=$(find /source/ -type f | wc -l)
TARGET=$(oci os object list -bn bucket --all | jq '.data | length')
echo "Progresso: $((TARGET*100/SOURCE))%"
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Como validar dados após transferência em massa para garantir integridade?

Validação pós-transferência:

**1. Contagem:** Compare número de arquivos e tamanho total

**2. Checksum:**
```bash
sha256sum /source/arquivo.dat > source.txt
sha256sum /tmp/downloaded.dat > target.txt
diff source.txt target.txt
```

**3. Database:**
```sql
SELECT table_name, num_rows FROM dba_tables WHERE owner = 'MEU_SCHEMA';
SELECT SUM(ORA_HASH(coluna1)) FROM minha_tabela;
```

**4. Checklist:** contagem, tamanho, checksums, metadata, estrutura de diretórios

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Como planejar cutover de dados seguro durante migração para OCI?

Planejamento de cutover:

**T-24h:** Notifique stakeholders, valide backup, confirme equipe

**T-4h:** Modo read-only, última sincronização, lag = 0

**T-0:** Pare aplicações, flush final, valide consistência, ative no target, redirecione DNS

**T+1h:** Smoke tests, valide transações, monitore métricas

**Rollback:** Mantenha source 72h, documente passos

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Como troubleshootar latência alta na replicação GoldenGate entre on-premises e OCI?

Troubleshooting de latência:

**1. Identifique onde está o lag:**
```
GGSCI> LAG EXTRACT ext1  # source
GGSCI> LAG EXTRACT dpump1  # rede
GGSCI> LAG REPLICAT rep1  # target
```

**2. Lag no Extract:** Verifique archive log generation, aumente redo log size

**3. Lag no Data Pump (rede):**
```bash
ping -c 100 <oci-host>
iperf3 -c <oci-host>
```
Aumente TCP buffer: TCPBUFSIZE 1000000

**4. Lag no Replicat:** GROUPTRANSOPS 10000, BATCHSQL

**5. Otimizações:** COMPRESS no Data Pump, parallel Replicat

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Melhores práticas para replicação contínua de dados para OCI?

Best practices:

**1. Arquitetura:** GoldenGate + FastConnect + Object Storage staging

**2. Rede:** FastConnect 1+ Gbps, QoS, redundância (FastConnect + VPN backup)

**3. GoldenGate config:**
```
TRANLOGOPTIONS INTEGRATEDPARAMS (max_sga_size 2048)
RMTHOSTOPTIONS COMPRESS
GROUPTRANSOPS 10000
BATCHSQL
```

**4. Monitoring:** Alarms para lag, OCI Monitoring, dashboard KPIs

**5. Segurança:** TLS 1.2+, OCI Vault para credentials, network segmentation

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data migration. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale data transfers.
Como configurar replicação contínua com OCI Data Integration e GoldenGate juntos?

Integração Data Integration + GoldenGate:

**1. GoldenGate** para replicação database-to-database em tempo real

**2. Data Integration** para ETL/transformações batch:
- Crie conexões source e target
- Defina pipelines de transformação
- Agende execuções

**3. Padrão híbrido:**
- GoldenGate: dados transacionais críticos
- Data Integration: transformações complexas, data warehousing

**4. Monitoramento unificado:** OCI Logging + OCI Monitoring

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
